title: nemophila menziesii var. intermedia
intro: Nemophila menziesii var. intermedia, commonly known as Menzies' nemophila or baby blue eyes, is a rare and endemic plant species found in California and Oregon in the United States. It belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant's health benefits include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Nemophila menziesii var. intermedia can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
